captureStep.text:
"IgnoreStringMatcher: match abc, but not [[abc]: on 'abc' -> Match [0/3]: abc
IgnoreStringMatcher: match abc, but not [[abc]: on '[abc' -> null
IgnoreStringMatcher: match abc, but not [[abc]: on 'abc]' -> Match [0/3]: abc
IgnoreStringMatcher: match abc, but not [[abc]: on '[abc]' -> null
IgnoreStringMatcher: match abc, but not [[abc]: on 'a[abc]c' -> null

IgnoreStringMatcher: match abc, but not [abc]]: on 'abc' -> Match [0/3]: abc
IgnoreStringMatcher: match abc, but not [abc]]: on '[abc' -> Match [1/4]: abc
IgnoreStringMatcher: match abc, but not [abc]]: on 'abc]' -> null
IgnoreStringMatcher: match abc, but not [abc]]: on '[abc]' -> null
IgnoreStringMatcher: match abc, but not [abc]]: on 'a[abc]c' -> null

IgnoreStringMatcher: match abc, but not [[abc]]: on 'abc' -> Match [0/3]: abc
IgnoreStringMatcher: match abc, but not [[abc]]: on '[abc' -> Match [1/4]: abc
IgnoreStringMatcher: match abc, but not [[abc]]: on 'abc]' -> Match [0/3]: abc
IgnoreStringMatcher: match abc, but not [[abc]]: on '[abc]' -> null
IgnoreStringMatcher: match abc, but not [[abc]]: on 'a[abc]c' -> null

IgnoreStringMatcher: match java, but not [javascript]: on 'a java b' -> Match [2/6]: java
IgnoreStringMatcher: match java, but not [javascript]: on 'a javascript b' -> null
IgnoreStringMatcher: match java, but not [javascript]: on 'a powerjava b' -> Match [7/11]: java
IgnoreStringMatcher: match java, but not [javascript, powerjava]: on 'a java b' -> Match [2/6]: java
IgnoreStringMatcher: match java, but not [javascript, powerjava]: on 'a javascript b' -> null
IgnoreStringMatcher: match java, but not [javascript, powerjava]: on 'a powerjava b' -> null
IgnoreStringMatcher: match xx, but not [00xx11xx22]: on 'a xx b' -> Match [2/4]: xx
IgnoreStringMatcher: match xx, but not [00xx11xx22]: on 'a 00xx11 b' -> Match [4/6]: xx
IgnoreStringMatcher: match xx, but not [00xx11xx22]: on 'a 11xx22 b' -> Match [4/6]: xx
IgnoreStringMatcher: match xx, but not [00xx11xx22]: on 'a 00xx11xx22 b' -> null
"
